zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Scarlett於1561年8月30日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德時，她的父親John Scarlett33歲，母親Emma27歲。她於1577年10月4日與John Warren在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德結婚。他們至少是14個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1602年3月27日在她的家鄉享年40歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Scarlett于1561年8月30日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德时，她的父亲John Scarlett33岁，母亲Emma27岁。她于1577年10月4日与John Warren在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德结婚。他们至少是14个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1602年3月27日在她的家乡享年40岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Scarlett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: perhaps a nickname for someone who made or sold bright, rich fabrics, from Middle English scarlet ‘scarlet (cloth)’ (Old French escarlate, Late Latin scarlata).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Scarlett was born on 30 August 1561, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Scarlett, was 33 and her mother, Emma, was 27. She married John Warren on 4 October 1577, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 14 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 27 March 1602, in her hometown, at the age of 40, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Scarlett est née le 30 août 1561, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Scarlett, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Emma, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé John Warren le 4 octobre 1577, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 14 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 mars 1602, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Scarlett am 30. August 1561 in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Scarlett 33 und ihre Mutter Emma 27. Sie hat am 4. Oktober 1577 in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Warren geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 14 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. März 1602 im Alter von 40 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Scarlett è nata il il 30 agosto 1561 nel Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Scarlett, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Emma, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato John Warren il 4 ottobre 1577, nel Nayland, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 14 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 27 marzo 1602, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolta a Nayland, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Scarlettが1561年8月30日にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父John Scarlettは33歳，母Emmaは27歳であった。1577年10月4日にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドでJohn Warrenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも14人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1602年3月27日に故郷で40歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Scarlett(이)가 1561년 8월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Scarlett(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1577년 10월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 John Warren(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1602년 3월 27일 그녀의 고향에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.30 August 1561–27 March 1602: 30 de agosto de 1561–27 de março de 1602
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Scarlett nasceu em 30 de agosto de 1561, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Scarlett, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Emma, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com John Warren em 4 de outubro de 1577, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 14 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de março de 1602, em sua cidade natal, com 40 anos, e foi sepultada em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Scarlett родилась 30 августа 1561 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Scarlett было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Emma, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Warren 4 октября 1577 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 14 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 27 марта 1602 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия.

es.30 August 1561–27 March 1602: 30 de agosto de 1561–27 de marzo de 1602
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Scarlett nació el 30 de agosto de 1561, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Scarlett, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Emma, tenía 27 años. Se casó con John Warren el 4 de octubre de 1577, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 14 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 27 de marzo de 1602, en su pueblo, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultada en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
